task_completion.description: Verify that mass overrides were applied to the Nose Cone, Body Tube, Trapezoidal Fin Set, Parachute, and Inner Tube.
task_completion.visual_evidence: OpenRocket component configuration dialogs showing the 'Override mass' checkbox ticked and values matching the target masses (e.g., Nose Cone: 28.5g, Body Tube: 38.0g, Fin Set: 12.5g, Parachute: 15.0g, Inner Tube: 5.5g).

task_completion.description: Verify that a flight simulation was executed to check stability and predicted apogee.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Flight simulations' tab in OpenRocket showing a completed simulation run with calculated apogee, velocity, and flight data visible.

task_completion.description: Verify the calibrated rocket design is saved to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: OpenRocket window title showing 'calibrated_simple_rocket.ork', a 'Save As' dialog targeting ~/Documents/rockets/, or a file manager/terminal showing the file exists in that directory.

task_completion.description: Verify the mass properties report text file was created in the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing the file 'mass_properties_report.txt' being edited or saved in ~/Documents/exports/.

task_completion.description: Verify the report contains all required information.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text file contents include a table of original vs measured masses, total rocket mass, CG (Center of Gravity) location, stability margin, predicted apogee altitude, and a flight recommendation.

integrity.description: Check that the agent used the OpenRocket GUI to modify the rocket and run simulations.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the OpenRocket application open with component edit windows and simulation tabs, rather than terminal commands modifying the .ork XML file directly.

integrity.description: Check that the report data is derived from the actual simulation.
integrity.visual_evidence: The apogee, CG, and stability values written in the text report match the values visible in the OpenRocket GUI screenshots.

integrity.description: Check that the report was genuinely written by the agent.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a text editor (e.g., gedit, nano) open with the report being typed, or terminal commands generating the text, rather than the file appearing without any visible creation process.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target mass overrides: Nose Cone (28.5g), Body Tube (38.0g), Trapezoidal Fin Set (12.5g), Parachute (15.0g), Inner Tube (5.5g) with a tolerance of ±2.0g. Output ORK file must be saved to: /home/ga/Documents/rockets/calibrated_simple_rocket.ork. Output report must be saved to: /home/ga/Documents/exports/mass_properties_report.txt.
